proof: function[T0: AddLeftOrderedGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not T0.lte(x0, x1) or T0.add(x2, x0) <= T0.add(x2, x1) }[G](G.0, --a, -a)
function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0) { T0.add(x0, T0.neg(x0)) = T0.0 }[G](-a)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.add(x0, T0.0) = x0 }[G](-a)

function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0) { T0.add(x0, T0.neg(x0)) = T0.0 }[G](-a)

function[T0: AddOrderedGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 <= x1 or x0 + x2 <= x1 + x2 }[F](a, b, c)
function[T0: AddLeftOrderedGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 <= x1 or x2 + x0 <= x2 + x1 }[F](c, d, b)
function[T0: AddOrderedGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not T0.lte(x0, x1) or T0.add(x0, x2) <= T0.add(x1, x2) }[F](a, b, -a)
function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0) { T0.add(x0, T0.neg(x0)) = T0.0 }[F](a)
function[T0: AddLeftOrderedGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not T0.lte(x0, x1) or T0.add(x2, x0) <= T0.add(x2, x1) }[F](F.0, b + -a, -b)
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { T0.add(x0, x1) + x2 = T0.add(x0, T0.add(x1, x2)) }[F](-b, b, -a)
function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0) { T0.neg(x0) + x0 = T0.0 }[F](b)
